zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Hungerford於1409年10月9日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼時，他的父親Walter Hungerford31歲，母親Katherine Peverell26歲。他於1426年與Margaret Burnell在英國結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和15個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年3月26日在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Hungerford于1409年10月9日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼时，他的父亲Walter Hungerford31岁，母亲Katherine Peverell26岁。他于1426年与Margaret Burnell在英国结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和15个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年3月26日在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Hungerford was born on 9 October 1409, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Walter Hungerford, was 31 and his mother, Katherine Peverell, was 26. He married Margaret Burnell in 1426, in England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 15 daughters. He died on 26 March 1484, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: Penhale by St Austell, Cornouailles, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Hungerford est né le 9 octobre 1409, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Hungerford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine Peverell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Burnell en 1426, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 15 filles. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1484, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Hungerford am 9. Oktober 1409 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Hungerford 31 und seine Mutter Katherine Peverell 26. Er hat 1426 in England Margaret Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Er starb am 26. März 1484 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Burnell nel 1426, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 15 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Hungerfordが1409年10月9日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで生まれた時，父Walter Hungerfordは31歳，母Katherine Peverellは26歳であった。1426年にイギリスでMargaret Burnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年3月26日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: 영국 코른월 펜할 비 스트 오스텔
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Hungerford(이)가 1409년 10월 9일 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Hungerford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Peverell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1426년 영국에서 Margaret Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 3월 26일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1409–26 March 1484: 9 de outubro de 1409–26 de março de 1484
pt.Farleigh castle, Farleigh Hungerford, So: Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Down Ampney Manor, Cirencester, Gloucest: Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Hungerford nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1409, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Hungerford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Peverell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Burnell em 1426, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 15 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1484, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, England: пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Hungerford родился 9 октября 1409 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Hungerford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Peverell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Burnell в 1426 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 15 дочерей. Он умер 26 марта 1484 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Hungerford nació el 9 de octubre de 1409, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Hungerford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherine Peverell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Burnell en 1426, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 15 hijas. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1484, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
